info.title: FlatRadar Backend API
info.description: Machine-readable contract for FlatRadar mobile clients. All JSON endpoints use a stable { ok, data | error } envelope.

post.summary: Receive inbound email from Resend webhook (email.received event).
post.description: Resend pushes email.received metadata to this endpoint when notify@flatradar.app receives mail. Authenticated via Svix HMAC-SHA256 signature — not Bearer token. FlatRadar then fetches the full email body from the Resend API and stores it in the admin notification panel. DMARC reports are auto-classified as inbound_dmarc; non-DMARC emails are forwarded to the configured admin inbox.

post.summary: Sign in and issue a bearer token.
Self-register a user account and issue a bearer token.
Change the current user's app password.

get.summary: Public aggregate statistics. Optional bearer accepted.
List supported public chart keys. Optional bearer accepted.
Return public chart data for a key. Optional bearer accepted.
List listings. Optional bearer accepted; user tokens apply listing_filter.

parameters.name: sources
parameters.description: Comma-separated source list, for example holland2stay,ourdomain.

get.summary: Return a listing detail. Optional bearer accepted; filtered-out user listings return 404.
Return cached map coordinates. Optional bearer accepted; never triggers geocoding side effects.
Return listings with available_from for calendar views. Optional bearer accepted.

post.summary: Mark selected or all notifications as read.

get.description: Accepts Authorization: Bearer <token> or ?token=<token> for EventSource clients.

get.summary: Return filter option values. Optional bearer accepted.

post.summary: Register or refresh a push device for the current token.

get.summary: List devices attached to the current token/session.

delete.summary: Delete a device attached to the current token/session.

post.summary: Send a test notification to the current token/session devices.
Upload crash, hang, or performance diagnostics. Optional bearer accepted.

get.summary: Return canonical Terms of Use and Privacy Policy text (public, unauthenticated).

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Language preference (en / zh). Falls back to Accept-Language header.

delete.summary: Delete a user and revoke app tokens.

post.summary: Full restart monitor process (stop + start, re-import Python modules).

SvixTimestampHeader.name: svix-timestamp
SvixTimestampHeader.description: Unix timestamp in seconds (verified within ±5 min tolerance).

SvixSignatureHeader.name: svix-signature
SvixSignatureHeader.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature, format v1,<base64> (space-delimited for key rotation).

Unauthorized.description: Missing, invalid, expired, or disabled bearer identity.

NotFound.description: Resource not found or hidden by user filter.

email_id.description: Resend email identifier. Use this to fetch the full body via the Resend API.
